summary: Iteration 32 - Comprehensive End-to-End Testing of SeniorAdvisor. Backend: 19/19 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All pages working correctly. Home, Search, Provider Detail, Blog, SeniorClub, Auth, Provider Dashboard - all functional.

issues: Gallery images show with alt text 'Foto 1', 'Foto 2' while loading - may be slow network issue, images eventually load
Loading spinner visible while fetching data - normal behavior but takes 2-3 seconds

backend_api_tests: GET /api/providers/{id} - returns provider detail with gallery and services
GET /api/admin/stats - returns dashboard stats (257 providers, 260 users)
Service type filtering at MongoDB query level verified
Provider services array includes service_type field
No duplicate service types observed in provider listings
Large result set query (300 providers) works correctly
Provider detail includes embedded services when services collection empty
frontend_ui_tests: HOME PAGE: Hero section, 3 service categories (Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental), SeniorClub banner, Buscar button
SEARCH PAGE: 50 providers displayed, 4 filter tabs (Todos, Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental), search input, 'Mapa no disponible' displayed
FILTER TABS: Clicking Residencias filters providers, service tags show correctly without duplicates
PROVIDER DETAIL: Name, rating (4.9), gallery section, pricing, services, contact section working
BLOG PAGE: 6 articles displayed with images, titles, excerpts
BLOG ARTICLE: Article detail page loads with full content and image
SENIORCLUB PAGE: Shows Help Rescate convenio with plans (Plan Hogar $8.336, Plan Rescate Total $32.152)
LOGIN: Admin login works, redirects to /admin
PROVIDER DASHBOARD: Shows Panel de Residencia with Rating 4.8, 45 Reseñas, 2 Servicios, Premium plans
AUTH: All 3 roles (admin/client/provider) can login successfully

critical_code_review_comments: Gallery images in provider detail page may show alt text briefly before loading - this is normal lazy loading behavior
Google Maps is intentionally disabled and shows 'Mapa no disponible' as expected

pages_verified.home: Working - Hero, service categories, SeniorClub banner
pages_verified.search: Working - Provider list, filter tabs, search input, 'Mapa no disponible'
pages_verified.provider_detail: Working - Name, rating, gallery, pricing, services, contact
pages_verified.blog: Working - Article list and detail pages
pages_verified.login: Working - Email/password and Google login options
pages_verified.provider_dashboard: Working - Shows stats, premium plans, tabs

mocked_apis.google_maps: Intentionally disabled - shows 'Mapa no disponible' (user will configure billing later)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 - All features tested and working. Backend API 100% pass rate. Frontend pages all functional. Key findings: 1) Search page shows 50 providers by default with working filter tabs. 2) Provider detail shows gallery images (may have brief loading delay). 3) Blog has 6 articles. 4) SeniorClub shows Help Rescate convenio. 5) All 3 auth roles (admin/client/provider) work. 6) Provider dashboard shows Panel de Residencia with stats and premium plans. 7) Google Maps intentionally disabled. No issues found - app is working in its entirety.
